title: Dress in the
Language
of Your Ancestors
hero.subtitle: Fine traditional garments, kids' clothing, and accessories — the very best of Algerian heritage, brought to your door.

title: Centuries of
Tradition,
Available Today
story.text: Every garment in our collection is sourced directly from Algerian artisan families. We honour their knowledge and bring their finest work to you — unadulterated and full of soul.

dispatch.label: Same-Day Dispatch
dispatch.desc: Orders confirmed before 14:00 ship the same afternoon

authentic.label: Certified Authentic
authentic.desc: Every piece is verified for authenticity before it reaches you

payment.label: Cash on Delivery
payment.desc: Cash on delivery accepted — no card required

review1.text: The burnous I received for my son's wedding was beyond expectation. The wool quality, the stitching - everything spoke of genuine craftsmanship.
review1.name: Fatima B.

review2.text: Ordered the Tlemcen kaftan as a gift for my mother. It arrived beautifully wrapped within 24 hours, exactly as described.
review2.name: Karim M.

review3.text: Exceptional quality and fast shipping. The embroidery work on the ceremonial piece I bought is simply museum-worthy.
review3.name: Nour El-Houda K.
